## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Single source folder only
- [ ] Multiple source folders
- [ ] Root-level docs/structure

## Verification

- [ ] Manually tested changed behavior
- [ ] Added/updated usage examples where needed
- [ ] Included reproduction steps for bug fix

Verification notes:

## Documentation Checklist

- [ ] Updated source README
- [ ] Updated root README (if structure changed)
- [ ] Updated dependency docs (if dependencies changed)
- [ ] Source includes requirements.txt, start.sh, and start.bat
- [ ] Startup scripts auto-create and use <tool-root>/.venv

## Source Onboarding (only for new source folders)

- [ ] Added source folder at repository root
- [ ] Added source README
- [ ] Added requirements.txt, start.sh, and start.bat
- [ ] Implemented auto-create/use flow for <tool-root>/.venv
- [ ] Documented requirements and limitations
- [ ] Linked source from root README

## Legal and Safety

- [ ] Change does not intentionally bypass legal restrictions
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private data committed

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, logs, or extra context if useful.
